Locale.Title: Display Language
Locale.Desc: Choose the interface language for Mod Loader

Theme.Title: Theme
Theme.Desc: Choose light, dark, or match your system appearance

Onboarding.Title: Welcome to Unturned Mod Loader
Onboarding.WelcomeDesc1: Manage your Unturned mods and automatically load enabled mods when launching the game.
Onboarding.WelcomeDesc2: We recommend setting your game install folder on first launch. We can try detecting it via Steam, or you can browse manually and configure it later.
Onboarding.GamePathDesc: Choose the folder that contains Unturned.exe. You can also click Skip and configure it later from the main window.
Onboarding.WinFspDesc: WinFsp is required to launch Unturned with mods. It creates a virtual drive that merges your mod files with the game folder. Click "Install WinFsp" below to run a one-click installer (requires administrator approval).
Onboarding.WinFspSkipHint: You can install WinFsp later from Settings → About. Without it, the game cannot be launched with mods.

Login.Title: Log in - Unturned Mod Loader
Login.Heading: Log in
Login.Subtitle: Sync favorites, downloads, and other personal data after signing in
Login.CredentialsRequired: Please enter your username and password.
Login.Failed: Login failed. Check your username and password.

Register.Title: Sign up - Unturned Mod Loader
Register.Heading: Create Account
Register.Subtitle: Sign up to use cloud mods and personal features
Register.Failed: Registration failed. Please try again later.
Register.UsernameInvalid: Username must be 3–32 letters, numbers, or underscores.
Register.PasswordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.

Main.Subtitle: Mod loading & management
Main.NoInstalledHint: Install mods while a mod profile is active. Files live in the profile store and mount into the game.
Main.GameRunningToggleBlocked: The game is running. Close it first.
Main.GameRunningCloseBlocked: The game is running. Please close the game before exiting the application.
Main.GameRunningDeleteBlocked: The game is running. Please close the game before removing mods.
Main.OpenVirtualDirectoryTip: Open the virtual game drive in File Explorer (vanilla game merged with the active profile's mods)
Main.WinFspRequired: WinFsp is required to launch the game. Install it in Settings.
Main.VirtualDriveNotMounted: Virtual drive is not mounted. Check WinFsp in Settings.
Main.CapturingRuntimeChanges: Absorbing runtime game folder changes into the active profile…
Main.CannotConnectHint: Make sure the local API is running (default http://localhost:3000)
Main.NoMatchHint: Try different keywords or switch category filters
Main.NoModsHint: Upload on the website and refresh here after approval

Settings.Title: Settings
Settings.GameInstallDesc: Choose the folder containing Unturned.exe. Mods are stored in profiles and mounted into this install.
Settings.CurrentAccountDesc: Sign in to sync favorites, downloads, and other personal data. You can browse mods and manage local installs without signing in.
Settings.GuestAccountHint: You are not signed in. You can use the app to browse mods and manage local installs. Sign in to sync personal data.
Settings.ApiDesc: Configure where mod data comes from. Restart the app after changing these settings.
Settings.AccountLoadFailed: Could not load account info. Try signing in again.
Settings.LocalApiRequired: Please enter the local API URL.
Settings.CloudApiRequired: Cloud API URL is required when using the cloud source.
Settings.ApiSaved: Saved. Restart the app for API connection changes to take effect.
Settings.CheckUpdatesFailed: Failed to check for updates. Please try again later.
Settings.IsLatestVersion: You are running the latest version.
Settings.ResetOnboardingDesc: Clear the setup wizard completion flag and re-run the first-time setup on next launch.
Settings.ResetOnboardingConfirmMsg: This will close the app and re-open the setup wizard. Continue?

WinFsp.Title: WinFsp file system driver
WinFsp.Desc: Some virtual file system features depend on WinFsp. Check status here or run one-click install (requires UAC administrator approval).
WinFsp.NotInstalled: WinFsp was not detected. Install it before using related mount features.
WinFsp.NotApplicable: WinFsp is only required on Windows.
WinFsp.InstallStarted: An elevated installer window was opened. After setup finishes, click Check again.
WinFsp.BundleMissing: Install scripts were not deployed with the app. Reinstall Mod Loader or run scripts from mod-loader/WinFsp manually.
WinFsp.UacCancelled: UAC elevation was cancelled or administrator rights were not granted.

GamePath.Detecting: Detecting from Steam registry and library folders…
GamePath.NotConfigured: Game folder is not configured yet.
GamePath.SelectedValid: A valid game folder was selected.
GamePath.SelectedInvalid: {0} was not found in the selected folder. Choose the correct Unturned install folder.

Steam.WindowsOnly: Auto-detection is only supported on Windows.
Steam.NotFound: Steam install path was not found in the registry. Please select the game folder manually.
Steam.Detected: Unturned was auto-detected from your Steam library.
Steam.InstalledNotFound: Steam was found, but Unturned was not detected. Make sure the game is installed or select the folder manually.

Api.Timeout: Request timed out. Check whether the server is running.
Api.CloudNotConfigured: Cloud API URL is not configured.

ModDetail.Title: Mod Details
ModDetail.DownloadFailed: Download failed. Please try again later.
ModDetail.DownloadInstalled: Mod installed to the active profile.
ModDetail.ProfileRequired: Configure a valid game folder and ensure the active profile is ready.

Profile.Title: Mod Profiles
Profile.Desc: Each profile combines your game install with overlay changes and mods into a virtual tree; switching profiles remounts onto the game folder.
Profile.GameRunning: Quit the game before switching profiles.
